use_cases: Display customer testimonials with animated profile images in a SaaS landing page
Showcase social proof with a visually engaging grid layout featuring staggered animations
Feature customer reviews in a modern, animated testimonial section for any industry
Create an eye-catching testimonials section with hover effects on contributor avatars
Build a responsive testimonial showcase that adapts layouts between desktop and mobile
ai_summary: An animated testimonial grid component with profile images positioned around a central content area. Features staggered entrance animations using framer-motion with spring physics, hover effects on images, and fully responsive design with different layout configurations across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports. Designed for showcasing social proof and customer testimonials with a modern, interactive presentation style suitable for landing pages and marketing sections.
